description_long: This airplane features a highly stylized, polygonal design with a rounded fuselage and sharply angular wings that extend widely from the body. The wings are broad and flat, with a slight backward sweep and pointed tips, and display a vibrant, multicolored pattern dominated by orange, green, and purple hues. The tail section is distinctively angular, with a prominent vertical stabilizer and a V-shaped tailplane. The landing gear consists of two thin, stick-like legs positioned beneath the fuselage, giving the aircraft a bird-like stance. The nose is elongated and pointed, with a cockpit area that appears to be integrated into the forward section of the fuselage, though no clear canopy or windows are visible. The overall appearance is abstract and geometric, with a playful, almost origami-like aesthetic.
description: A polygonal, multicolored airplane with wide, angular wings, a pointed nose, and a V-tail, featuring a stylized, geometric design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the broad, angular wings and the V-shaped tail, with the landing gear visible beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated nose, angular tail, and stick-like landing gear, with the wing profile visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, wide wingspan, and the symmetry of the wing and tail configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the angular body, pointed nose, and geometric tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with broad, straight wings featuring a slight backward sweep and pointed tips; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the airframe.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with two sharply angled stabilizers forming a V-shape at the rear.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed landing gear with two thin, stick-like main gear units; no visible nose or tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted cockpit area integrated into the nose section, with no visible canopy or windows; configuration appears single-seat and enclosed.
